name: Disabled SSL/TLS Certificate Validation
description: Detects code that disables SSL/TLS certificate verification, enabling man-in-the-middle attacks on all HTTPS traffic (CWE-295).

examples.before:
# Python: disabling certificate verification
response = requests.get(url, verify=False)
examples.after:
# Python: use proper certificate verification
response = requests.get(url, verify='/path/to/ca-bundle.crt')
